Menu / audio.spatial

Can Swift packages do spatial audio?

also known as: 3d audio · ambisonics · binaural

Audio16 Images7 Media4 MIDI2 Networking9 Speech2 Video4 Voice1
PackageiOSmacOSwatchOStvOSvisionOSLinuxCatalyst

Nothing on the menu — and that's the answer. As of July 2026 no dedicated Swift package serves spatial audio — we swept the full package index for ambisonics, binaural, HRTF, Atmos, and head-tracking wrappers and found none. Apple's own frameworks are the path: PHASE for game/interactive scenes, AVAudioEnvironmentNode for 3D positioning in AVAudioEngine, and CMHeadphoneMotionManager for head tracking. Know a package that proves us wrong? Tell us →

✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Served fresh · 45 capabilities × 71 packages · 101 records · data v1

Every verdict links to the exact source line that decides it. How it works
